archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Editorial IDE / Terminal Light Mode)

headings.rules: Used for H1, H2, H3. Must use `tracking-tight` or `tracking-tighter`.

body.rules: Used for all paragraphs and descriptive text. Keep `leading-relaxed`.

monospace.rules: CRITICAL: Use for all overlines, section numbers, metadata, skills tags, and technical UI elements.

hierarchy.h1: font-['Cabinet_Grotesk'] text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-bold text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: font-['Cabinet_Grotesk'] text-3xl md:text-4xl tracking-tight font-bold text-slate-900
hierarchy.code_snippet: font-mono text-sm text-slate-800 bg-slate-100 p-1 px-2 rounded-sm

accents.primary_description: Tech Vermilion / Syntax String - Used for main CTAs and highlights
accents.secondary_description: Electric Blue / Syntax Keyword - Used for links and secondary tags
accents.tertiary_description: Console Green / Syntax Comment - Used for success states and minor accents

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: The 'Control Room' / 'IDE Layout'. Utilize visible 1px borders (`border-slate-200`) to divide the page into panels rather than floating sections. Embrace asymmetry (e.g., 3-column grid where left column is narrow and acts as a line-number/index pane).
layout_and_spacing.card_style: Neo-brutalist / Technical. Flat pure white backgrounds (`bg-white`), sharp corners (`rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`), 1px solid border (`border-slate-200`). On hover, use a sharp solid shadow `shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0F172A]` and translate slightly `-translate-y-1`.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous. Use `gap-8`, `gap-12`, and `py-24` to ensure breathing room inside the rigid grid structure.

components.buttons: Square or slightly rounded (`rounded-sm`). Primary CTA: `bg-orange-600 hover:bg-orange-700 text-white font-mono uppercase tracking-wider text-sm px-6 py-3`. Secondary CTA: `bg-transparent border border-slate-300 text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 font-mono text-sm px-6 py-3`.
components.tags_and_badges: Font-mono, text-xs, border border-slate-200, px-2 py-1 bg-slate-50 text-slate-600. For tech stack items.
components.inputs: Shadcn based. Use square corners (`rounded-none`), `border-slate-300`, `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500 focus:border-orange-500`. Label should be font-mono text-xs.
components.icons: Use `lucide-react` with 1.5 stroke width. Keep icon sizes consistent (`w-5 h-5`).

interactions_and_motion.scroll: MUST use `lenis` for smooth scrolling. It gives the page a premium, intentional feel.
interactions_and_motion.animations: Use `framer-motion`. Staggered fade-up for list items (skills, projects). Typewriter effect for terminal/code-like elements in the hero.
interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Interactive elements must show clear state changes. Text links should feature an underline animation. Cards use the hard offset shadow effect.

subject.name: Karanam Naga Sumana
subject.education: B.Tech Electronics & Computer Engineering, Mahindra University (2023–2027)

sections.title: 00. INIT
sections.content_instructions: Design as an IDE pane. Include a simulated 'terminal' window typing out the professional summary. Prominent CTAs for 'View Projects' and 'Download Resume'. Use monospace text for the tagline. Provide a distinct Light Theme editorial vibe using off-white backgrounds.

sections.title: 01. SYSTEM_INFO
sections.content_instructions: Split pane layout. Left pane: line numbers. Right pane: Bio and Education timeline (Mahindra Univ B.Tech 6.5 CGPA, Deeksha 94%, Little Flower 91%). Add subtle code comment syntax (e.g., `// Background`).

sections.title: 02. DEPENDENCIES
sections.content_instructions: Bento grid or dense tag layout. Group by Languages (C, Python, Java, MATLAB), Libraries (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, SQL), and Tools (Jupyter, Git, Google Colab). Color-code tags using the accent colors to mimic syntax highlighting.

sections.title: 03. EXECUTABLES
sections.content_instructions: Showcase: HR Analytics, Stock Price Prediction, IPL Data Analytics Dashboard. Display as technical cards with visible borders. Include an image, project title, monospace tech stack tags, and links (GitHub/Live). Use hard shadows on hover.

sections.title: 04. PROCESSES
sections.content_instructions: List layout. 1st Place MANTHAN '25 BITS Pilani, Top 5 Student of the Year Hackathon, Logistics Head leadership roles. Use a sleek, tabular, data-grid inspired layout.

sections.title: 05. SEND_REQ
sections.content_instructions: A working contact form (Name, Email, Message) styled like an API request configuration or terminal input. Button 'POST /api/contact'. Will store in MongoDB (API route must be implemented).

images.description: White analytics chart, perfect for HR Analytics or IPL Dashboard project thumbnails.
Open laptop on a white desk with code, ideal for Hero section side visual or About background.

media.rules: Do NOT use placeholder images from dummy services. Use the provided Pexels URLs. Apply a subtle grayscale or low-saturation filter (`grayscale-[50%]`) on images to match the editorial light theme, bringing back full color on hover.

testing_requirements.rules: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, form submits) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case. Example: `data-testid='hero-resume-btn'` or `data-testid='contact-submit-btn'`.

developer_instructions: Install `framer-motion` for reveal animations and typewriter effects.
Do NOT use `Inter` font. Ensure `Cabinet Grotesk`, `IBM Plex Sans`, and `JetBrains Mono` are imported via Google Fonts / Fontshare.
When building the layout, use `min-h-screen bg-slate-50 text-slate-900`. Use pure white (`bg-white`) only for cards/panels to create contrast against the off-white background.
Set up the Contact Form to post to a MongoDB-backed Next.js API route (or equivalent backend in the stack).
